title: War Machine Campaign
label: War and contractor push
summary: A campaign for war contractors, procurement, human-cost source lanes, conflict routes, and public-record war machine mapping.
boundary: Campaign calendars are reusable public planning assets. They are not promises of automated or live posting.
dailyPushes: Day 1: open with the machine: budgets, contracts, agencies, bodies.
Day 2: route readers to human-cost sources.
Day 3: push Blackwater and WWIII book pages.
Day 4: share the War Machine Pack.
Day 5: post a video caption from the share kit.
Day 6: route to the feed center and update monitor.
Day 7: recap the contractor reader path.
